title: Developmental Pathways From Childhood Neurodevelopmental Traits to Early Adolescent Psychiatric Dimensions: The Role of Environmental and Lifestyle Factors.

Screen use is explicitly modeled as a pathway variable linking neurodevelopmental traits to psychiatric dimensions — the null mediation result is still a tested association.
